The documentation I created includes:
- docs/CLIENT-IDENTITY-SETUP.md - Identity configuration steps
- docs/CLIENT-CMS-OVERVIEW.md - Comprehensive CMS user guide for clients
- docs/CMS-QUICK-REFERENCE.md - Quick reference card for common tasks
- docs/WELCOME-EMAIL-TEMPLATE.md - Email templates for onboarding

* 11/7/2023, 8:30:26 PM
summary: This document is a project showcase for "claude-mem," a persistent memory compression system built for Claude Code, highlighted as a #1 GitHub Trending repository. It demonstrates the system's multi-language support and functionality through screenshots of a code editor and a web UI, showing capabilities like documentation generation and project management. The examples illustrate how the system assists with tasks such as creating documentation and managing email templates, along with user interaction for reviewing past work.
